title: dryopteris hendersonii
intro: Dryopteris hendersonii, also known as Henderson's wood fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Dryopteris hendersonii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its effectiveness and safety should be evaluated by a healthcare professional before use.
